  • Overview

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractDAO<T>
    Generic abstract Data Access Object that provides CRUD operations
    Bill
    Represents a bill for an order.
    BillBLL
    Business Logic Layer for handling operations related to Bill entities.
    BillDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) class for handling operations related to bills.
    Client
    Represents a client with personal and contact details.
    ClientBLL
    Business Logic Layer for handling operations related to Client entities.
    ClientDAO
    Data Access Object for Client entity
    ClientView
    The ClientView class provides a GUI for managing clients.
    ConnectionFactory
     
    Main
    Main class to launch the application.
    Order
    Represents an order placed by a client for a product.
    OrderBLL
    Business Logic Layer for handling operations related to Order entities.
    OrderDAO
    Data Access Object for Order entity
    OrderView
    OrderView is a GUI class to manage orders.
    Product
    Represents a product with a name, price, and stock quantity.
    ProductBLL
    Business Logic Layer for handling operations related to Product entities.
    ProductDAO
    Data Access Object for Product entity
    ProductView
    This class represents the Product management GUI.
    TableUtils
    Utility class to build a table model from a list of objects.
